response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song title 'フィナーレ。' (Finale.) from on-screen text. 2. Performed web search for 'eill "フィナーレ。" lyrics'. 3. Confirmed eill as the original artist. 4. Identified Kobo Kanaeru as the performer. 5. Retrieved lyrics and translated to English.
response.global_summary: A continuous, 3D concert performance by Kobo Kanaeru, singing the song "フィナーレ。" (Finale.) by eill.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru performs the song 'フィナーレ。' (Finale.) on a 3D stage throughout the entire video.
